questionHtml: State one process that results in the loss of carbon dioxide from a marine organism such as a crustacean or a jellyfish.
markschemeHtml:
a. (aerobic/cellular) respiration ✔

b. gas exchange / diffusion ✔

Do not accept photosynthesis.

Do not accept breathing

Organism is taken to be a living thing.
